name: allergy-panel
title: Allergy Panel
description: Allergies & intolerances as a safety-tinted panel. Composes WidgetPanel + AllergyList, which renders its own "No known allergies" state.

props.name: max
props.description: Collapse to N before a "+N more".

props.name: ...WidgetPanel
props.description: title, action, info, state pass through.

clinicalNotes: Allergies are safety-critical, so the panel uses the destructive tone and deserves a dedicated, always-visible slot in any summary. Crucially, an empty allergy list is NOT the same as unknown — AllergyList renders an explicit 'No known allergies' state, which this panel surfaces rather than a blank body, so absence of data is never mistaken for a safe negative. Surface the verification date via `info`.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds PatientSummaryPanel (P-1) and the Patient Chart block.
